summary: V56.1 Full System Verification - Backend 18/18 tests pass, Frontend pages load correctly except FractalEngine has R3F runtime errors

ui_bugs.issue: React Three Fiber runtime errors: 'R3F: Cannot set x-line-number' and 'TypeError: Cannot convert undefined or null to object' when clicking on 3D nodes

issues: Bundle size warning: 1.71MB exceeds 1MB threshold for fast mobile loading

action_items: FractalEngine: Fix R3F Text component compatibility issue - consider updating @react-three/drei or using alternative text rendering
critical_code_review_comments: FractalEngine.js uses @react-three/drei Text component which has compatibility issues with current R3F version

success_rate.frontend: 90% (9/10 pages load correctly, FractalEngine has runtime errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: V56.1 features verified: (1) Daily cross-module challenges API returns 4 elemental challenges with task progress, (2) All core data APIs working (crystals 12, herbology 12, aromatherapy 12, elixirs 10, acupressure 10, yoga 7, oracle zodiac 12, frequencies 12, mudras 25, nourishment 8, reiki 10), (3) Sovereign Hub shows DailyChallenges component, (4) Crystals page shows discovery grid with fog nodes, (5) Oracle I Ching tab shows coin toss interface, (6) Yoga page shows 'Begin Flow' guided flow, (7) Numerology page loads without syntax errors, (8) DreamRealms page shows ProgressGate, (9) Breathing page has __workAccrue hook. FractalEngine has R3F runtime errors but loads.
